market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Cozy 3 Bedroom Home | Walk to Leeds Arena | £136/night
Leeds City Centre Sleep 3 | Short Walk to Arena | Best Rate £136
Leeds Stay | Arena Walking Distance | 3 Bed | £136/night
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to our charming 3-bedroom home in the heart of Leeds City Centre! We're proud to offer this stylish property at an incredible value, with a nightly rate of £136 that's 22% below the local median. This ideal base for exploration is just a short walk from the Leeds Arena, allowing you to experience all the city has to offer. Our home is designed to accommodate up to 4 guests, with a spacious bedroom layout and all the essentials for a comfortable stay. Whether you're visiting for business or pleasure, we're confident you'll love our little slice of Leeds!
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor space - providing a peaceful oasis in the midst of the bustling city
Parking facilities - essential for guests arriving by car
Entertainment options - such as a large TV or games console
analysis.photo_order_rec: We recommend making the living room our cover photo, as it showcases the property's cozy atmosphere and is the most likely room type to appear in your guests' reviews.
key_diagnosis: Increase nightly rate to align with cohort median of £175 to boost occupancy by 17.5% (from 56.5% to 74%). This would result in an estimated additional £1,500 in revenue over 39 open nights, according to your own pricing and occupancy data.
Add a photo showcase of your outdoor space to enhance the property's appeal and provide a respite from the city's noise.
Implement essential amenities like parking facilities and a welcome pack with entertainment options to elevate the guest experience, addressing 100% of missing amenity gaps.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your occupancy rate is 28.3% below the cohort median, with 39 potential booking nights in the next 90 days. Consider adjusting your pricing strategy to better align with the local market.
